title: erigeron delphiniifolius
intro: Erigeron delphiniifolius, also known as Sea or Blue Devil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron delphiniifolius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergy symptoms. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
